text: You watched a truck idle behind a grocery store.
You found a dead bird under the dryer vent.
You spent fifteen minutes watching a man unload oranges.
You began avoiding gas stations with bright lighting.
You heard someone coughing inside an empty house.
The motel pool was covered for the season.
You found thirty-seven shoes near a drainage ditch.
You carried the same flashlight for eleven years.
You slept through an entire thunderstorm.
You noticed that birds seem louder near warehouses.
You saw a television playing inside an empty laundromat.
You became afraid of open water.
You stopped liking fluorescent lights.
You stood under a highway overpass during heavy rain.
You decided the cornfields were not empty.
You kept a receipt in your wallet until the ink disappeared.
You watched rainwater collect in a parking lot crack.
You counted seven pigeons on a single wire.
You noticed a door that was always slightly open.
You smelled cut grass from three blocks away.
You watched a man read a newspaper without turning pages.
You found a glove on a fence post and left it.
You heard a generator running behind a closed store.
You noticed the same rust stain on a bridge every year.
You watched steam rise from a manhole cover for a long time.
You saw a dog tied outside a pharmacy for twenty minutes.
You counted the steps from your bed to the bathroom.
You noticed a light that never turned off in an empty building.
You watched a woman carry one bag into a laundromat.
You found a penny heads-up in a puddle.
You heard a screen door slam three houses away.
You watched fog move across a field like something breathing.
You noticed tire marks that never washed away.
You saw a chair sitting alone in a yard.
You watched a sprinkler miss the same patch of grass every day.
You found a note written on the back of a receipt.
You heard an ice machine running in an empty motel hallway.
You noticed a window that reflected the wrong sky.
You watched a crow pick at something in the road.
You counted four different sirens before noon.
You found a key without a tag in a parking lot.
You watched a flag hang motionless for an entire afternoon.
You noticed a stain on the ceiling that looked like a map.
You heard typing from an office with the lights off.
You watched a delivery truck circle the block twice.
You found a single sock on a bench.
You noticed the same car parked in the same spot for weeks.
You watched a man sweep a sidewalk that was already clean.
You heard a phone ring inside a closed shop.
You found a plastic fork bent into a curve.
